name: soapysdr0.8-module-hydrasdr
title: soapysdr0.8-module-hydrasdr
description:
HydraSDR device support for SoapySDR
The Soapy HydraSDR project provides a SoapySDR hardware support module.
.
Adds HydraSDR RFOne software defined radio support via Soapy.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use soapysdr0.8-module-hydrasdr because HydraSDR device support for SoapySDR.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use soapysdr0.8-module-hydrasdr as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair soapysdr0.8-module-hydrasdr with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `soapysdr0.8-module-hydrasdr --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
